info.title: 修复deepseek-resoner文件修改获取和重复记录问题

parts.text: 现在VSCode Cline插件无法通过@packages/vscode-extension/src/interceptors/apiInterceptor.ts 获取deepseek-resoner模型修改了哪些文件，并且上报后端的推理过程记录和AI回复记录是重复的，请更正这两个问题。

用户描述了两个问题：
1. VSCode Cline插件无法通过 `packages/vscode-extension/src/interceptors/apiInterceptor.ts` 获取 deepseek-resoner 模型修改了哪些文件
2. 上报后端的推理过程记录和AI回复记录是重复的

我需要先查看相关文件来理解问题。让我先读取 apiInterceptor.ts 文件。

<type>file</type>
<content>1: /**
2:  * @agentlog/vscode-extension — API 拦截器
3:  *
4:  * 职责：在开发者使用 Cline、Cursor 等 AI 工具时，
5:  * 拦截对国内大模型（DeepSeek、Qwen、Kimi 等）的 HTTP/HTTPS 请求，
6:  * 提取 Prompt、Reasoning（推理过程）和 Response，
7:  * 并通过 BackendClient 上报到本地后台存储。
8:  *
9:  * 实现策略：
10:  *  - 通过 Monkey-patch Node.js 内置的 http.request / https.request，
11:  *    在 VS Code 扩展进程层面全局拦截所有出站 HTTP(S) 请求。
12:  *  - 对匹配到的 AI API 端点，拦截请求体与响应体（含 SSE 流式响应）。
13:  *  - 支持 OpenAI-Compatible 接口规范（DeepSeek / Qwen / Kimi / Doubao 均兼容）。
14:  *
15:  * ⚠️  注意事项：
16:  *  - Monkey-patch 会影响整个扩展进程，使用时务必保证幂等性（不重复 patch）。
17:  *  - 仅拦截匹配 AI_HOST_PATTERNS 的域名，不拦截无关请求。
18:  *  - 拦截器采集数据后异步上报，不阻塞原始请求链路。
19:  */
20: 
21: import http from "http";
22: import https from "https";
23: import diagnostics_channel from "diagnostics_channel";
24: import { EventEmitter } from "events";
25: import * as vscode from "vscode";
26: import type {
27:   AgentSource,
28:   ModelProvider,
29:   CreateSessionRequest,
30: } from "@agentlog/shared";
31: import {
32:   getBackendClient,
33:   BackendUnreachableError,
34: } from "../client/backendClient";
35: 
36: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
37: // 常量：需要拦截的 AI API 域名 / 路径规则
38: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
39: 
40: /**
41:  * 需要拦截的 AI API 主机名模式（正则）。
42:  * 命中后才会进入拦截逻辑，避免影响其他网络请求。
43:  */
44: const AI_HOST_PATTERNS: RegExp[] = [
45:   /api\.deepseek\.com/i,
46:   /api\.openai\.com/i,
47:   /dashscope\.aliyuncs\.com/i, // 通义千问（DashScope）
48:   /api\.moonshot\.cn/i, // Kimi（月之暗面）
49:   /ark\.cn-beijing\.volces\.com/i, // 字节豆包（Ark）
50:   /open\.bigmodel\.cn/i, // 智谱 ChatGLM
51:   /localhost/i, // 本地 Ollama / LM Studio
52:   /127\.0\.0\.1/,
53:   /0\.0\.0\.0/,
54: ];
55: 
56: /**
57:  * 仅拦截 Chat Completions 端点路径（精确匹配）。
58:  * 避免拦截鉴权、文件上传等无关接口。
59:  */
60: const COMPLETION_PATH_PATTERNS: RegExp[] = [
61:   /\/chat\/completions/i,
62:   /\/v1\/chat\/completions/i,
63:   /\/api\/chat/i,
64:   /\/v1\/messages/i, // Anthropic-style
65:   /\/compatible-mode\/v1\/chat\/completions/i, // 通义千问兼容模式
66: ];
67: 
68: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
69: // 类型定义
70: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
71: 
72: /** OpenAI-Compatible 请求体（简化版） */
73: /** 消息内容块（Anthropic / Cline 风格） */
74: type ContentBlock =
75:   | string
76:   | Array<{ type: string; text?: string; [key: string]: unknown }>;
77: 
78: /** OpenAI-Compatible 请求体（简化版） */
79: interface ChatCompletionRequest {
80:   model?: string;
81:   messages?: Array<{ role: string; content: ContentBlock }>;
82:   stream?: boolean;
83:   temperature?: number;
84:   max_tokens?: number;
85:   [key: string]: unknown;
86: }
87: 
88: /** OpenAI-Compatible 响应体（非流式） */
89: interface ChatCompletionResponse {
90:   id?: string;
91:   model?: string;
92:   choices?: Array<{
93:     message?: {
94:       role?: string;
95:       content?: string;
96:       reasoning_content?: string; // DeepSeek-R1 推理字段
97:     };
98:     finish_reason?: string;
99:   }>;
100:   usage?: {
101:     prompt_tokens?: number;
102:     completion_tokens?: number;
103:     total_tokens?: number;
104:   };
105:   [key: string]: unknown;
106: }
107: 
108: /** SSE 流式 chunk（delta 格式） */
109: interface StreamChunk {
110:   id?: string;
111:   model?: string;
112:   choices?: Array<{
113:     delta?: {
114:       content?: string;
115:       reasoning_content?: string; // DeepSeek-R1 流式推理字段
116:     };
117:     finish_reason?: string | null;
118:   }>;
119: }
120: 
121: /** fetch 拦截上下文（在 _interceptFetch 与 _processFetch* 之间传递） */
122: interface FetchInterceptContext {
123:   startedAt: number;
124:   host: string;
125:   path: string;
126:   parsedRequest: ChatCompletionRequest;
127:   source: AgentSource;
128:   statusCode: number;
129: }
130: 
131: /** 一次完整的拦截事件（用于内部流转） */
132: export interface InterceptedSession {
133:   /** 请求发起时间戳（ms） */
134:   startedAt: number;
135:   /** 目标主机 */
136:   host: string;
137:   /** 请求路径 */
138:   path: string;
139:   /** 解析后的请求体 */
140:   requestBody: ChatCompletionRequest;
141:   /** 最终组装的完整响应内容 */
142:   responseContent: string;
143:   /** 推理过程内容（DeepSeek-R1 等） */
144:   reasoningContent: string;
145:   /** 响应中报告的模型名称（可能与请求中不同） */
146:   responseModel: string;
147:   /** 请求是否为流式（SSE） */
148:   isStream: boolean;
149:   /** 响应 HTTP 状态码 */
150:   statusCode: number;
151:   /** 总耗时（ms） */
152:   durationMs: number;
153: }
154: 
155: /** 文件变更记录（供 FileChangeTracker 内部使用） */
156: interface TrackedFileChange {
157:   /** 文件相对路径 */
158:   relativePath: string;
159:   /** 变更时间戳（ms） */
160:   timestamp: number;
161:   /** 变更类型 */
162:   kind: "changed" | "created" | "deleted";
163: }
164: 
165: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
166: // 模型识别工具
167: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
168: 
169: /**
170:  * 根据主机名推断 ModelProvider。
171:  */
172: function inferProvider(host: string): ModelProvider {
173:   if (/deepseek/.test(host)) return "deepseek";
174:   if (/aliyun|dashscope|qwen/.test(host)) return "qwen";
175:   if (/moonshot|kimi/.test(host)) return "kimi";
176:   if (/volces|doubao/.test(host)) return "doubao";
177:   if (/bigmodel|zhipu|chatglm/.test(host)) return "zhipu";
178:   if (/openai/.test(host)) return "openai";
179:   if (/anthropic/.test(host)) return "anthropic";
180:   return "unknown";
181: }
182: 
183: /**
184:  * 从请求 Authorization header 或请求体推断调用来源（Cline / Cursor / Continue 等）。
185:  * 目前通过 User-Agent 或特定 header 辅助判断，大多数情况下返回 'unknown'。
186:  * 实际来源在更高层（InterceptorManager）根据注册顺序标记。
187:  */
188: function inferSource(
189:   headers:
190:     | http.IncomingHttpHeaders
191:     | Record<string, string | string[] | undefined>,
192: ): AgentSource {
193:   const ua = String(headers["user-agent"] ?? "").toLowerCase();
194:   if (ua.includes("cline")) return "cline";
195:   if (ua.includes("cursor")) return "cursor";
196:   if (ua.includes("continue")) return "continue";
197:   if (ua.includes("copilot")) return "copilot";
198:   return "unknown";
199: }
200: 
201: /**
202:  * 将 ContentBlock（string 或 Anthropic 风格数组）规范化为纯文本。
203:  *
204:  * Cline 使用 Anthropic SDK 发送消息时，content 字段是数组：
205:  *   [{ type: "text", text: "Hello" }, { type: "image", source: {...} }]
206:  * 需要提取其中所有 text 块拼接为字符串。
207:  */
208: function normalizeContent(content: ContentBlock | undefined | null): string {
209:   if (!content) return "";
210:   if (typeof content === "string") return content;
211:   if (Array.isArray(content)) {
212:     return content
213:       .filter((b) => b.type === "text" && typeof b.text === "string")
214:       .map((b) => b.text!)
215:       .join("\n");
216:   }
217:   return String(content);
218: }
219: 
220: /**
221:  * 从消息列表中提取用户最后一条 Prompt 文本。
222:  * 若有多条 user 消息，取最后一条（最贴近当前交互）。
223:  *
224:  * 兼容 OpenAI（content: string）和 Anthropic/Cline（content: ContentBlock[]）格式。
225:  */
226: function extractPrompt(messages: ChatCompletionRequest["messages"]): string {
227:   if (!messages || messages.length === 0) return "";
228:   // 取最后一条 user 或 human 角色的消息
229:   const userMessages = messages.filter(
230:     (m) => m.role === "user" || m.role === "human",
231:   );
232:   if (userMessages.length > 0) {
233:     return normalizeContent(userMessages[userMessages.length - 1].content);
234:   }
235:   // 回退：取最后一条消息
236:   return normalizeContent(messages[messages.length - 1].content);
237: }
238: 
239: /**
240:  * 从 DeepSeek-R1 的 reasoning_content 或响应文本中提取 <think>...</think> 推理块。
241:  *
242:  * DeepSeek-R1 通过两种方式暴露推理过程：
243:  *  1. 非流式：choices[0].message.reasoning_content 字段（最可靠）
244:  *  2. 流式：delta.reasoning_content 累积
245:  *  3. 兜底：在 content 中查找 <think>...</think> 标签
246:  */
247: function extractReasoning(
248:   content: string,
249:   reasoningContent?: string,
250: ): string | undefined {
251:   if (reasoningContent && reasoningContent.trim()) {
252:     return reasoningContent.trim();
253:   }
254:   // 从 content 中提取 <think> 块
255:   const thinkMatch = content.match(/<think>([\s\S]*?)<\/think>/i);
256:   if (thinkMatch) {
257:     return thinkMatch[1].trim();
258:   }
259:   return undefined;
260: }
261: 
262: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
263: // SSE 流解析
264: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
265: 
266: /**
267:  * 解析 SSE（Server-Sent Events）流数据，累积 content 和 reasoning_content。
268:  * 每次收到新 chunk 时调用，返回当前累积的内容。
269:  */
270: function parseStreamChunk(
271:   raw: string,
272:   accContent: string,
273:   accReasoning: string,
274: ): { content: string; reasoning: string; model: string } {
275:   let content = accContent;
276:   let reasoning = accReasoning;
277:   let model = "";
278: 
279:   const lines = raw.split("\n");
280:   for (const line of lines) {
281:     if (!line.startsWith("data: ")) continue;
282:     const data = line.slice(6).trim();
283:     if (data === "[DONE]") break;
284: 
285:     try {
286:       const chunk = JSON.parse(data) as StreamChunk;
287:       if (chunk.model) model = chunk.model;
288: 
289:       for (const choice of chunk.choices ?? []) {
290:         const delta = choice.delta ?? {};
291:         if (delta.content) content += delta.content;
292:         if (delta.reasoning_content) reasoning += delta.reasoning_content;
293:       }
294:     } catch {
295:       // 忽略解析失败的 chunk
296:     }
297:   }
298: 
299:   return { content, reasoning, model };
300: }
301: 
302: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
303: // 工具：解析 http.request 的各种重载签名，统一提取请求元信息
304: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
305: 
306: /**
307:  * 将 http.request / https.request 的多态参数统一解析为
308:  * { host, path, method, headers } 结构。
309:  *
310:  * Node.js http.request 支持三种调用形式：
311:  *  1. request(url: string, callback?)
312:  *  2. request(url: URL, options?, callback?)
313:  *  3. request(options: RequestOptions, callback?)
314:  */
315: function resolveRequestOptions(
316:   urlOrOptions: string | URL | http.RequestOptions | https.RequestOptions,
317:   extraOptions?: http.RequestOptions | https.RequestOptions,
318: ): {
319:   host: string;
320:   path: string;
321:   method: string;
322:   headers: Record<string, string | string[] | undefined>;
323: } {
324:   let host = "";
325:   let urlPath = "/";
326:   let method = "GET";
327:   let headers: Record<string, string | string[] | undefined> = {};
328: 
329:   if (typeof urlOrOptions === "string") {
330:     try {
331:       const u = new URL(urlOrOptions);
332:       host = u.hostname;
333:       urlPath = u.pathname + u.search;
334:     } catch {
335:       host = urlOrOptions;
336:     }
337:   } else if (
338:     typeof urlOrOptions === "object" &&
339:     urlOrOptions !== null &&
340:     "hostname" in urlOrOptions &&
341:     "pathname" in urlOrOptions
342:   ) {
343:     // URL instance
344:     const u = urlOrOptions as URL;
345:     host = u.hostname;
346:     urlPath = u.pathname + u.search;
347:   } else {
348:     // http.RequestOptions
349:     const opts = urlOrOptions as http.RequestOptions;
350:     host = (opts.hostname ?? opts.host ?? "").replace(/:\d+$/, "");
351:     urlPath = opts.path ?? "/";
352:     method = opts.method ?? "GET";
353:     headers =
354:       (opts.headers as Record<string, string | string[] | undefined>) ?? {};
355:   }
356: 
357:   if (extraOptions) {
358:     if (extraOptions.method) method = extraOptions.method;
359:     if (extraOptions.headers) {
360:       headers = extraOptions.headers as Record<
361:         string,
362:         string | string[] | undefined
363:       >;
364:     }
365:   }
366: 
367:   return { host, path: urlPath, method: method.toUpperCase(), headers };
368: }
369: 
370: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
371: // 核心拦截器：HTTP Monkey-Patch
372: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
373: 
374: /**
375:  * HttpApiInterceptor
376:  *
377:  * 通过 Monkey-patch Node.js 内置的 http.request / https.request 实现全局请求拦截。
378:  * 只拦截命中 AI_HOST_PATTERNS + COMPLETION_PATH_PATTERNS 的请求。
379:  *
380:  * 采用 EventEmitter 发布拦截到的会话数据，解耦采集与上报逻辑。
381:  */
382: export class HttpApiInterceptor extends EventEmitter {
383:   private _active = false;
384:   private _patchedHttp = false;
385:   private _patchedHttps = false;
386:   private _patchedFetch = false;
387: 
388:   /** 原始（未 patch）的 http.request */
389:   private _originalHttpRequest?: typeof http.request;
390:   /** 原始（未 patch）的 https.request */
391:   private _originalHttpsRequest?: typeof https.request;
392:   /** 原始（未 patch）的 globalThis.fetch（降级方案） */
393:   private _originalFetch?: typeof globalThis.fetch;
394: 
395:   /**
396:    * diagnostics_channel 订阅列表。
397:    * 用于在 deactivate 时取消所有订阅。
398:    */
399:   private _dcSubscriptions: Array<{
400:     channel: string;
401:     callback: (message: unknown, name: string | symbol) => void;
402:   }> = [];
403: 
404:   /** 当前工作区路径（用于上报时标注来源） */
405:   private _workspacePath: string;
406: 
407:   /** 用于 VS Code 状态栏 / 输出面板的日志频道 */
408:   private _outputChannel: vscode.OutputChannel;
409: 
410:   /** 是否开启调试日志 */
411:   private _debug = false;
412: 
413:   /** 文件变更追踪器（外部注入，由 InterceptorManager 管理生命周期） */
414:   private _fileChangeTracker?: FileChangeTracker;
415: 
416:   constructor(options: {
417:     workspacePath: string;
418:     outputChannel: vscode.OutputChannel;
419:     debug?: boolean;
420:     fileChangeTracker?: FileChangeTracker;
421:   }) {
422:     super();
423:     this._workspacePath = options.workspacePath;
424:     this._outputChannel = options.outputChannel;
425:     this._debug = options.debug ?? false;
426:     this._fileChangeTracker = options.fileChangeTracker;
427:   }
428: 
429:   /** 已上报的会话数（用于外部状态展示） */
430:   public reportedCount = 0;
431: 
432:   // ─── 生命周期 ───────────────────────────────
433: 
434:   /**
435:    * 激活拦截器：注入 Monkey-patch。
436:    * 幂等操作，重复调用无副作用。
437:    */
438:   activate(): void {
439:     if (this._active) return;
440: 
441:     this._patchHttp();
442:     this._patchHttps();
443:     this._patchFetch();
444:     this._active = true;
445:     this._log("API 拦截器已激活（http + https + diagnostics_channel）");
446:   }
447: 
448:   /**
449:    * 停用拦截器：还原原始 http.request / https.request。
450:    */
451:   deactivate(): void {
452:     if (!this._active) return;
453: 
454:     this._restoreHttp();
455:     this._restoreHttps();
456:     this._restoreFetch();
457:     this._active = false;
458:     this._log("API 拦截器已停用");
459:   }
460: 
461:   get isActive(): boolean {
462:     return this._active;
463:   }
464: 
465:   /**
466:    * 更新工作区路径（工作区切换时调用）。
467:    */
468:   setWorkspacePath(path: string): void {
469:     this._workspacePath = path;
470:   }
471: 
472:   // ─── HTTP Patch ─────────────────────────────
473: 
474:   private _patchHttp(): void {
475:     if (this._patchedHttp) return;
476:     this._originalHttpRequest = http.request.bind(http);
477:     const self = this;
478: 
479:     (http as unknown as { request: unknown }).request =
480:       function patchedHttpRequest(
481:         urlOrOptions: string | URL | http.RequestOptions,
482:         optionsOrCallback?:
483:           | http.RequestOptions
484:           | ((res: http.IncomingMessage) => void),
485:         maybeCallback?: (res: http.IncomingMessage) => void,
486:       ) {
487:         return self._intercept(
488:           false,
489:           self._originalHttpRequest!,
490:           urlOrOptions,
491:           optionsOrCallback,
492:           maybeCallback,
493:         );
494:       };
495: 
496:     this._patchedHttp = true;
497:   }
498: 
499:   private _patchHttps(): void {
500:     if (this._patchedHttps) return;
501:     this._originalHttpsRequest = https.request.bind(https);
502:     const self = this;
503: 
504:     (https as unknown as { request: unknown }).request =
505:       function patchedHttpsRequest(
506:         urlOrOptions: string | URL | https.RequestOptions,
507:         optionsOrCallback?:
508:           | https.RequestOptions
509:           | ((res: http.IncomingMessage) => void),
510:         maybeCallback?: (res: http.IncomingMessage) => void,
511:       ) {
512:         return self._intercept(
513:           true,
514:           self._originalHttpsRequest!,
515:           urlOrOptions,
516:           optionsOrCallback,
517:           maybeCallback,
518:         );
519:       };
520: 
521:     this._patchedHttps = true;
522:   }
523: 
524:   private _restoreHttp(): void {
525:     if (!this._patchedHttp || !this._originalHttpRequest) return;
526:     http.request = this._originalHttpRequest;
527:     this._patchedHttp = false;
528:   }
529: 
530:   private _restoreHttps(): void {
531:     if (!this._patchedHttps || !this._originalHttpsRequest) return;
532:     https.request = this._originalHttpsRequest;
533:     this._patchedHttps = false;
534:   }
535: 
536:   // ─── Fetch 拦截（diagnostics_channel 方案）───
537:   //
538:   // 为什么不用 Monkey-patch globalThis.fetch？
539:   //
540:   // Cline 等扩展使用的 OpenAI / Anthropic SDK 在 **构造函数执行时** 就
541:   // 将 globalThis.fetch 的引用缓存到 this.fetch：
542:   //
543:   //   this.fetch = u.fetch ?? Iwo()       // OpenAI SDK
544:   //   // Iwo(): if(typeof fetch<"u") return fetch  ← 缓存引用
545:   //
546:   // 无论 AgentLog 何时 patch globalThis.fetch，SDK 内部后续调用的
547:   // 都是那份 **已缓存的旧引用**，monkey-patch 永远不会被触发。
548:   //
549:   // 解决方案：Node.js diagnostics_channel。
550:   // 内置 fetch 底层使用 undici，undici 在请求生命周期中会向
551:   // diagnostics_channel 发布事件。无论 fetch 引用被谁缓存，
552:   // 底层 undici 都会经过相同的 channel，我们只需订阅即可拦截。
553:   //
554:   // 已验证：即使先 `const cached = globalThis.fetch`，再订阅 DC，
555:   //         调用 `cached(url)` 时 DC 依然能捕获到请求。
556: 
557:   /**
558:    * 通过 diagnostics_channel 订阅 undici 请求事件以拦截 fetch 调用。
559:    *
560:    * 原理：
561:    *  - undici:request:create  → 识别 AI API 请求，注入 onBodySent / onHeaders / onData / onComplete 钩子
562:    *  - onBodySent             → 捕获请求体（Buffer 形式）
563:    *  - onHeaders              → 捕获 HTTP 状态码与 Content-Type
564:    *  - onData                 → 捕获响应体 chunk（含 SSE 流）
565:    *  - onComplete             → 汇总并上报完整会话
566:    *
567:    * 优势：
568:    *  - 不依赖 globalThis.fetch 引用，彻底解决 SDK 缓存问题
569:    *  - 与 OpenTelemetry 使用相同的底层机制，稳定可靠
570:    *  - 对调用方完全透明，零侵入
571:    */
572:   private _patchFetch(): void {
573:     if (this._patchedFetch) return;
574: 
575:     // diagnostics_channel 在 Node.js 16+ 可用；undici DC 事件在 18+ 可用
576:     if (typeof diagnostics_channel?.subscribe !== "function") {
577:       this._debugLog("[DC] diagnostics_channel 不可用，跳过");
578:       return;
579:     }
580: 
581:     const self = this;
582: 
583:     const onRequestCreate = (
584:       message: unknown,
585:       _name: string | symbol,
586:     ): void => {
587:       if (!self._active) return;
588: 
589:       // undici:request:create 的 message 结构：{ request }
590:       const msg = message as {
591:         request: {
592:           origin: string;
593:           path: string;
594:           method: string;
595:           addHeader: (key: string, value: string) => void;
596:           onBodySent: ((chunk: Buffer | null) => void) | null;
597:           onRequestSent: (() => void) | null;
598:           onHeaders: (
599:             statusCode: number,
600:             headers: Buffer[],
601:             resume: () => void,
602:             statusText: string,
603:           ) => void;
604:           onData: (chunk: Buffer) => number | void;
605:           onComplete: (trailers: Buffer[]) => void;
606:           onError: (err: Error) => void;
607:         };
608:       };
609: 
610:       const req = msg.request;
611:       if (!req || !req.origin || !req.path) return;
612: 
613:       let host: string;
614:       try {
615:         host = new URL(req.origin).hostname;
616:       } catch {
617:         return;
618:       }
619:       const path = req.path;
620:       const method = (req.method ?? "GET").toUpperCase();
621: 
622:       const shouldIntercept =
623:         method === "POST" &&
624:         AI_HOST_PATTERNS.some((re) => re.test(host)) &&
625:         COMPLETION_PATH_PATTERNS.some((re) => re.test(path));
626: 
627:       if (!shouldIntercept) return;
628: 
629:       self._debugLog(`[DC 拦截] ${method} ${host}${path}`);
630: 
631:       // ── 注入拦截钩子 ──
632:       const startedAt = Date.now();
633:       const requestBodyChunks: Buffer[] = [];
634:       const responseBodyChunks: Buffer[] = [];
635:       let statusCode = 0;
636:       let contentType = "";
637: 
638:       // 捕获请求体（必须复制，避免 undici 内部缓冲池复用导致数据被覆盖）
639:       const origOnBodySent = req.onBodySent;
640:       req.onBodySent = function (chunk: Buffer | null) {
641:         if (chunk) {
642:           requestBodyChunks.push(Buffer.from(chunk));
643:         }
644:         return origOnBodySent?.call(this, chunk);
645:       };
646: 
647:       // 捕获响应状态码和 Content-Type
648:       const origOnHeaders = req.onHeaders;
649:       req.onHeaders = function (
650:         sc: number,
651:         headers: Buffer[],
652:         resume: () => void,
653:         statusText: string,
654:       ) {
655:         statusCode = sc;
656:         // undici headers 是 [key, value, key, value, ...] 的 Buffer 数组
657:         try {
658:           for (let i = 0; i < headers.length - 1; i += 2) {
659:             const key = headers[i].toString().toLowerCase();
660:             if (key === "content-type") {
661:               contentType = headers[i + 1].toString();
662:               break;
663:             }
664:           }
665:         } catch {
666:           // 忽略 header 解析错误
667:         }
668:         return origOnHeaders.call(this, sc, headers, resume, statusText);
669:       };
670: 
671:       // 捕获响应体 chunk
672:       // ⚠️ 关键：必须用 Buffer.from() 复制每个 chunk！
673:       // undici 内部使用缓冲池，onData 传入的 chunk 可能是池中某段内存的 view，
674:       // 当 onData 返回后 undici 会复用该内存。如果只存引用不复制，
675:       // 到 onComplete 汇总时数据已被后续 chunk 覆盖，导致内容全部损坏。
676:       const origOnData = req.onData;
677:       req.onData = function (chunk: Buffer) {
678:         if (chunk) {
679:           responseBodyChunks.push(Buffer.from(chunk));
680:         }
681:         return origOnData.call(this, chunk);
682:       };
683: 
684:       // 响应结束：汇总并上报
685:       const origOnComplete = req.onComplete;
686:       req.onComplete = function (trailers: Buffer[]) {
687:         const result = origOnComplete.call(this, trailers);
688: 
689:         // 异步处理，不阻塞 undici 的请求管线
690:         try {
691:           self._processDCInterception(
692:             host,
693:             path,
694:             requestBodyChunks,
695:             responseBodyChunks,
696:             statusCode,
697:             contentType,
698:             startedAt,
699:           );
700:         } catch (err) {
701:           self._debugLog(
702:             `[DC] 处理拦截数据异常: ${err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err)}`,
703:           );
704:         }
705: 
706:         return result;
707:       };
708:     };
709: 
710:     diagnostics_channel.subscribe("undici:request:create", onRequestCreate);
711:     this._dcSubscriptions.push({
712:       channel: "undici:request:create",
713:       callback: onRequestCreate,
714:     });
715: 
716:     this._patchedFetch = true;
717:     this._debugLog(
718:       "[DC] diagnostics_channel undici 拦截已启用（解决 SDK fetch 缓存问题）",
719:     );
720:   }
721: 
722:   private _restoreFetch(): void {
723:     if (!this._patchedFetch) return;
724: 
725:     for (const sub of this._dcSubscriptions) {
726:       try {
727:         diagnostics_channel.unsubscribe(sub.channel, sub.callback);
728:       } catch {
729:         // 忽略取消订阅错误
730:       }
731:     }
732:     this._dcSubscriptions = [];
733: 
734:     this._patchedFetch = false;
735:     this._debugLog("[DC] diagnostics_channel undici 拦截已停用");
736:   }
737: 
738:   /**
739:    * 处理通过 diagnostics_channel 捕获的完整请求/响应数据。
740:    *
741:    * 统一处理流式（SSE）和非流式响应：
742:    *  - DC 的 onData 回调会收集所有响应 chunk（包括 SSE 的逐行数据）
743:    *  - 在 onComplete 时，所有 chunk 已收齐，可以一次性解析
744:    *  - 对于 SSE，将累积的 chunk 当作完整 SSE 文本用 parseStreamChunk 解析
745:    */
746:   private _processDCInterception(
747:     host: string,
748:     path: string,
749:     requestBodyChunks: Buffer[],
750:     responseBodyChunks: Buffer[],
751:     statusCode: number,
752:     contentType: string,
753:     startedAt: number,
754:   ): void {
755:     if (statusCode >= 400) {
756:       this._debugLog(`[DC] 响应状态 ${statusCode}，跳过上报`);
757:       return;
758:     }
759: 
760:     const durationMs = Date.now() - startedAt;
761:     const requestBodyText = Buffer.concat(requestBodyChunks).toString("utf-8");
762:     const responseBodyText =
763:       Buffer.concat(responseBodyChunks).toString("utf-8");
764: 
765:     let parsedRequest: ChatCompletionRequest = {};
766:     try {
767:       if (requestBodyText) {
768:         parsedRequest = JSON.parse(requestBodyText);
769:       }
770:     } catch {
771:       // 忽略
772:     }
773: 
774:     // SSE 检测：优先用 Content-Type，降级用响应体特征
775:     const isStream =
776:       contentType.includes("text/event-stream") ||
777:       (!contentType && responseBodyText.trimStart().startsWith("data: "));
778: 
779:     let accContent = "";
780:     let accReasoning = "";
781:     let responseModel = "";
782: 
783:     if (isStream) {
784:       // SSE 流式：逐行解析累积的完整 SSE 文本
785:       const parsed = parseStreamChunk(responseBodyText, "", "");
786:       accContent = parsed.content;
787:       accReasoning = parsed.reasoning;
788:       responseModel = parsed.model;
789:     } else {
790:       // 非流式 JSON
791:       try {
792:         const json = JSON.parse(responseBodyText) as ChatCompletionResponse;
793:         accContent = json.choices?.[0]?.message?.content ?? "";
794:         accReasoning = json.choices?.[0]?.message?.reasoning_content ?? "";
795:         responseModel = json.model ?? "";
796:       } catch {
797:         // JSON 解析失败，可能是未识别的 SSE 流，再试一次 SSE 解析
798:         if (responseBodyText.includes("data: ")) {
799:           const parsed = parseStreamChunk(responseBodyText, "", "");
800:           accContent = parsed.content;
801:           accReasoning = parsed.reasoning;
802:           responseModel = parsed.model;
803:         } else {
804:           accContent = responseBodyText;
805:         }
806:       }
807:     }
808: 
809:     this._debugLog(
810:       `[DC] contentType=${JSON.stringify(contentType)} isStream=${isStream} ` +
811:         `respLen=${responseBodyText.length} ` +
812:         `contentLen=${accContent.length} reasoningLen=${accReasoning.length} ` +
813:         `model=${responseModel}`,
814:     );
815: 
816:     // deepseek-reasoner 等推理模型可能只有 reasoning_content 而 content 为空，
817:     // 此时仍应上报（推理过程本身是有价值的数据）
818:     if (!accContent && !accReasoning) {
819:       this._debugLog("[DC] 响应无有效 content 和 reasoning，跳过上报");
820:       return;
821:     }
822: 
823:     // 尝试从 User-Agent 等信息推断 source（DC 场景下信息有限，默认 unknown）
824:     const source: AgentSource = "unknown";
825: 
826:     const session: InterceptedSession = {
827:       startedAt,
828:       host,
829:       path,
830:       requestBody: parsedRequest,
831:       responseContent: accContent,
832:       reasoningContent: accReasoning,
833:       responseModel: responseModel || parsedRequest.model || "unknown",
834:       isStream,
835:       statusCode,
836:       durationMs,
837:     };
838: 
839:     this._reportSession(session, source).catch((err) => {
840:       if (!(err instanceof BackendUnreachableError)) {
841:         this._log(
842:           `[DC 上报失败] ${err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err)}`,
843:         );
844:       }
845:     });
846: 
847:     this.emit("session", {
848:       host,
849:       path,
850:       durationMs,
851:       statusCode,
852:       model: responseModel || parsedRequest.model,
853:     });
854:   }
855: 
856:   // ─── 拦截核心逻辑 ───────────────────────────
857: 
858:   /**
859:    * 实际拦截逻辑：判断是否命中规则，若命中则截获请求/响应体。
860:    */
861:   private _intercept(
862:     isHttps: boolean,
863:     original: typeof http.request | typeof https.request,
864:     urlOrOptions: string | URL | http.RequestOptions | https.RequestOptions,
865:     optionsOrCallback?:
866:       | http.RequestOptions
867:       | https.RequestOptions
868:       | ((res: http.IncomingMessage) => void),
869:     maybeCallback?: (res: http.IncomingMessage) => void,
870:   ): http.ClientRequest {
871:     // 解析请求选项以判断是否需要拦截
872:     const { host, path, method, headers } = resolveRequestOptions(
873:       urlOrOptions,
874:       typeof optionsOrCallback === "function" ? undefined : optionsOrCallback,
875:     );
876: 
877:     const shouldIntercept =
878:       this._active &&
879:       method === "POST" &&
880:       AI_HOST_PATTERNS.some((re) => re.test(host)) &&
881:       COMPLETION_PATH_PATTERNS.some((re) => re.test(path));
882: 
883:     if (!shouldIntercept) {
884:       // 不需要拦截，直接透传原始调用
885:       // @ts-expect-error
886:       return original(urlOrOptions, optionsOrCallback, maybeCallback);
887:     }
888: 
889:     this._debugLog(`[拦截] ${isHttps ? "https" : "http"}://${host}${path}`);
890: 
891:     const startedAt = Date.now();
892:     const requestBodyChunks: Buffer[] = [];
893:     let accContent = "";
894:     let accReasoning = "";
895:     let responseModel = "";
896:     let statusCode = 200;
897:     let isStream = false;
898: 
899:     // 解析 source（尽力推断）
900:     const source = inferSource(headers);
901: 
902:     // ── 创建原始请求 ──
903:     // 使用原始函数发起真实请求，同时挂载监听器
904:     const callback =
905:       typeof optionsOrCallback === "function"
906:         ? optionsOrCallback
907:         : maybeCallback;
908: 
909:     const wrappedCallback = (res: http.IncomingMessage) => {
910:       statusCode = res.statusCode ?? 200;
911:       const contentType = String(res.headers["content-type"] ?? "");
912:       isStream = contentType.includes("text/event-stream");
913: 
914:       const responseChunks: Buffer[] = [];
915: 
916:       res.on("data", (chunk: Buffer) => {
917:         responseChunks.push(chunk);
918: 
919:         if (isStream) {
920:           // 流式：边收边解析，实时累积内容
921:           const text = chunk.toString("utf-8");
922:           const parsed = parseStreamChunk(text, accContent, accReasoning);
923:           accContent = parsed.content;
924:           accReasoning = parsed.reasoning;
925:           if (parsed.model) responseModel = parsed.model;
926:         }
927:       });
928: 
929:       res.on("end", () => {
930:         if (!isStream) {
931:           // 非流式：一次性解析完整响应
932:           const raw = Buffer.concat(responseChunks).toString("utf-8");
933:           try {
934:             const json = JSON.parse(raw) as ChatCompletionResponse;
935:             accContent = json.choices?.[0]?.message?.content ?? "";
936:             accReasoning = json.choices?.[0]?.message?.reasoning_content ?? "";
937:             responseModel = json.model ?? "";
938:           } catch {
939:             accContent = raw;
940:           }
941:         }
942: 
943:         const durationMs = Date.now() - startedAt;
944: 
945:         // 解析请求体
946:         const rawRequestBody =
947:           Buffer.concat(requestBodyChunks).toString("utf-8");
948:         let parsedRequest: ChatCompletionRequest = {};
949:         try {
950:           parsedRequest = JSON.parse(rawRequestBody);
951:         } catch {
952:           // 忽略解析失败
953:         }
954: 
955:         if (statusCode < 400 && accContent) {
956:           const session: InterceptedSession = {
957:             startedAt,
958:             host,
959:             path,
960:             requestBody: parsedRequest,
961:             responseContent: accContent,
962:             reasoningContent: accReasoning,
963:             responseModel: responseModel || parsedRequest.model || "unknown",
964:             isStream,
965:             statusCode,
966:             durationMs,
967:           };
968: 
969:           // 异步上报，不阻塞响应处理
970:           this._reportSession(session, source).catch((err) => {
971:             if (!(err instanceof BackendUnreachableError)) {
972:               this._log(
973:                 `[上报失败] ${err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err)}`,
974:               );
975:             }
976:           });
977:         }
978: 
979:         // 触发事件（供外部监听，例如状态栏更新）
980:         this.emit("session", {
981:           host,
982:           path,
983:           durationMs,
984:           statusCode,
985:           model: responseModel || parsedRequest.model,
986:         });
987:       });
988: 
989:       // 将原始响应传递给上游 callback
990:       if (callback) callback(res);
991:     };
992: 
993:     const req: http.ClientRequest = (original as Function)(
994:       urlOrOptions,
995:       typeof optionsOrCallback === "function"
996:         ? wrappedCallback
997:         : optionsOrCallback,
998:       typeof optionsOrCallback === "function" ? undefined : wrappedCallback,
999:     );
1000: 
1001:     // 若 optionsOrCallback 不是 callback（即是 options），则手动绑定 wrappedCallback
1002:     if (typeof optionsOrCallback !== "function") {
1003:       req.removeAllListeners("response");
1004:       req.on("response", wrappedCallback);
1005:     }
1006: 
1007:     // 监听请求体写入
1008:     const originalWrite = req.write.bind(req);
1009:     req.write = function (
1010:       chunk: string | Buffer | Uint8Array,
1011:       encodingOrCb?: BufferEncoding | ((err?: Error | null) => void),
1012:       cb?: (err?: Error | null) => void,
1013:     ): boolean {
1014:       if (chunk) {
1015:         requestBodyChunks.push(
1016:           Buffer.isBuffer(chunk) ? chunk : Buffer.from(chunk as string),
1017:         );
1018:       }
1019:       if (typeof encodingOrCb === "function") {
1020:         return originalWrite(chunk, encodingOrCb);
1021:       }
1022:       return originalWrite(
1023:         chunk,
1024:         (encodingOrCb as BufferEncoding) ?? "utf-8",
1025:         cb,
1026:       );
1027:     };
1028: 
1029:     return req;
1030:   }
1031: 
1032:   // ─── 上报逻辑 ───────────────────────────────
1033: 
1034:   /**
1035:    * 将拦截到的会话上报到 AgentLog 后台。
1036:    */
1037:   private async _reportSession(
1038:     session: InterceptedSession,
1039:     source: AgentSource,
1040:   ): Promise<void> {
1041:     const { requestBody, responseContent, reasoningContent, responseModel } =
1042:       session;
1043: 
1044:     const rawPrompt = extractPrompt(requestBody.messages);
1045:     // 防御：extractPrompt 理论上总返回 string，但若上游数据异常仍可能非 string
1046:     const prompt =
1047:       typeof rawPrompt === "string" ? rawPrompt : String(rawPrompt ?? "");
1048:     if (!prompt.trim()) {
1049:       this._debugLog("[跳过] 无法提取有效 Prompt，跳过上报");
1050:       return;
1051:     }
1052: 
1053:     const reasoning = extractReasoning(
1054:       responseContent,
1055:       reasoningContent || undefined,
1056:     );
1057:     // 若 reasoning 已内嵌在 content 中，从 content 中去除 <think> 块
1058:     let cleanedResponse = responseContent
1059:       .replace(/<think>[\s\S]*?<\/think>/gi, "")
1060:       .trim();
1061: 
1062:     // deepseek-reasoner 等推理模型可能 content 为空，所有输出都在 reasoning_content 中。
1063:     // 此时用 reasoning 的前 500 字符作为 response 摘要，确保会话记录不丢失。
1064:     if (!cleanedResponse && reasoning) {
1065:       cleanedResponse =
1066:         reasoning.length > 500
1067:           ? reasoning.substring(0, 500) +
1068:             "…（推理过程，完整内容见 reasoning 字段）"
1069:           : reasoning;
1070:     }
1071: 
1072:     const provider = inferProvider(session.host);
1073: 
1074:     // 查询在本次 AI 会话期间发生变更的文件
1075:     const affectedFiles = this._fileChangeTracker
1076:       ? this._fileChangeTracker.getChangesBetween(
1077:           session.startedAt,
1078:           session.startedAt + session.durationMs,
1079:         )
1080:       : [];
1081: 
1082:     if (affectedFiles.length > 0) {
1083:       this._debugLog(
1084:         `[文件变更] 检测到 ${affectedFiles.length} 个文件: ${affectedFiles.slice(0, 5).join(", ")}${affectedFiles.length > 5 ? " ..." : ""}`,
1085:       );
1086:     }
1087: 
1088:     const createReq: CreateSessionRequest = {
1089:       provider,
1090:       model: responseModel,
1091:       source,
1092:       workspacePath: this._workspacePath,
1093:       prompt,
1094:       reasoning,
1095:       response: cleanedResponse,
1096:       affectedFiles,
1097:       durationMs: session.durationMs,
1098:       tags: [],
1099:       metadata: {
1100:         host: session.host,
1101:         path: session.path,
1102:         isStream: session.isStream,
1103:         statusCode: session.statusCode,
1104:         usage: (requestBody as { usage?: unknown }).usage,
1105:       },
1106:     };
1107: 
1108:     const client = getBackendClient();
1109:     const created = await client.createSession(createReq);
1110: 
1111:     this._debugLog(
1112:       `[上报成功] 会话 ${created.id.slice(0, 8)} | ${provider}/${responseModel} | ${session.durationMs}ms`,
1113:     );
1114: 
1115:     // 触发上报成功事件（供状态栏 / 通知等 UI 消费）
1116:     this.emit("reported", created);
1117:   }
1118: 
1119:   // ─── 日志 ────────────────────────────────────
1120: 
1121:   private _log(message: string): void {
1122:     this._outputChannel.appendLine(`[AgentLog] ${message}`);
1123:   }
1124: 
1125:   private _debugLog(message: string): void {
1126:     if (this._debug) {
1127:       this._outputChannel.appendLine(`[AgentLog][DEBUG] ${message}`);
1128:     }
1129:   }
1130: }
1131: 
1132: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
1133: // FileChangeTracker：追踪工作区文件变更
1134: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
1135: 
1136: /**
1137:  * FileChangeTracker
1138:  *
1139:  * 监听 VS Code 工作区内的文件保存、创建、删除事件，
1140:  * 维护一个带时间戳的滚动窗口。
1141:  *
1142:  * 当 HttpApiInterceptor 上报会话时，通过
1143:  *   `getChangesBetween(startMs, endMs)`
1144:  * 查询在 AI 请求期间发生变更的文件列表，填充 affectedFiles。
1145:  *
1146:  * 设计要点：
1147:  *  - 只记录工作区内的文件（相对路径），忽略外部文件
1148:  *  - 滚动窗口默认 10 分钟，避免无限增长
1149:  *  - 去重：同一文件多次变更只记录一次路径
1150:  */
1151: export class FileChangeTracker implements vscode.Disposable {
1152:   private _changes: TrackedFileChange[] = [];
1153:   private _disposables: vscode.Disposable[] = [];
1154:   private _workspacePath = "";
1155: 
1156:   /** 变更记录保留时长（ms），默认 10 分钟 */
1157:   private readonly RETENTION_MS = 10 * 60 * 1000;
1158: 
1159:   constructor() {}
1160: 
1161:   /**
1162:    * 开始监听文件变更。
1163:    */
1164:   start(workspacePath: string): void {
1165:     this._workspacePath = workspacePath;
1166:     this._changes = [];
1167: 
1168:     // 文件保存
1169:     this._disposables.push(
1170:       vscode.workspace.onDidSaveTextDocument((doc) => {
1171:         this._recordChange(doc.uri, "changed");
1172:       }),
1173:     );
1174: 
1175:     // 文件创建
1176:     this._disposables.push(
1177:       vscode.workspace.onDidCreateFiles((e) => {
1178:         for (const uri of e.files) {
1179:           this._recordChange(uri, "created");
1180:         }
1181:       }),
1182:     );
1183: 
1184:     // 文件删除
1185:     this._disposables.push(
1186:       vscode.workspace.onDidDeleteFiles((e) => {
1187:         for (const uri of e.files) {
1188:           this._recordChange(uri, "deleted");
1189:         }
1190:       }),
1191:     );
1192: 
1193:     // 文件重命名（视为 delete + create）
1194:     this._disposables.push(
1195:       vscode.workspace.onDidRenameFiles((e) => {
1196:         for (const { oldUri, newUri } of e.files) {
1197:           this._recordChange(oldUri, "deleted");
1198:           this._recordChange(newUri, "created");
1199:         }
1200:       }),
1201:     );
1202:   }
1203: 
1204:   /**
1205:    * 更新工作区路径（工作区切换时调用）。
1206:    */
1207:   setWorkspacePath(path: string): void {
1208:     this._workspacePath = path;
1209:   }
1210: 
1211:   /**
1212:    * 查询在 [startMs, endMs] 时间窗口内变更的文件列表（去重）。
1213:    *
1214:    * @param startMs  会话开始时间戳（ms）
1215:    * @param endMs    会话结束时间戳（ms），默认 now
1216:    * @param bufferMs 结束后额外缓冲时间（ms），默认 5 秒
1217:    *                 Cline 在收到 AI 响应后才写入文件，需要缓冲
1218:    * @returns 去重后的相对路径列表
1219:    */
1220:   getChangesBetween(
1221:     startMs: number,
1222:     endMs: number = Date.now(),
1223:     bufferMs: number = 5000,
1224:   ): string[] {
1225:     const from = startMs;
1226:     const to = endMs + bufferMs;
1227: 
1228:     const paths = new Set<string>();
1229:     for (const change of this._changes) {
1230:       if (change.timestamp >= from && change.timestamp <= to) {
1231:         paths.add(change.relativePath);
1232:       }
1233:     }
1234:     return Array.from(paths);
1235:   }
1236: 
1237:   /**
1238:    * 停止监听并清理。
1239:    */
1240:   stop(): void {
1241:     for (const d of this._disposables) d.dispose();
1242:     this._disposables = [];
1243:     this._changes = [];
1244:   }
1245: 
1246:   dispose(): void {
1247:     this.stop();
1248:   }
1249: 
1250:   // ─── 内部方法 ───────────────────────────────
1251: 
1252:   private _recordChange(
1253:     uri: vscode.Uri,
1254:     kind: TrackedFileChange["kind"],
1255:   ): void {
1256:     const fsPath = uri.fsPath;
1257: 
1258:     // 忽略工作区外的文件
1259:     if (!this._workspacePath || !fsPath.startsWith(this._workspacePath)) {
1260:       return;
1261:     }
1262: 
1263:     // 忽略常见的非源码文件
1264:     if (
1265:       fsPath.includes("node_modules") ||
1266:       fsPath.includes(".git/") ||
1267:       fsPath.includes("dist/") ||
1268:       fsPath.endsWith(".log")
1269:     ) {
1270:       return;
1271:     }
1272: 
1273:     const relativePath = fsPath
1274:       .substring(this._workspacePath.length)
1275:       .replace(/^[/\\]+/, "");
1276: 
1277:     this._changes.push({
1278:       relativePath,
1279:       timestamp: Date.now(),
1280:       kind,
1281:     });
1282: 
1283:     // 清理过期记录
1284:     this._pruneOldChanges();
1285:   }
1286: 
1287:   private _pruneOldChanges(): void {
1288:     const cutoff = Date.now() - this.RETENTION_MS;
1289:     // 从头部移除过期记录（_changes 按时间递增）
1290:     while (this._changes.length > 0 && this._changes[0].timestamp < cutoff) {
1291:       this._changes.shift();
1292:     }
1293:   }
1294: }
1295: 
1296: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
1297: // InterceptorManager：统一管理多个拦截器实例
1298: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
1299: 
1300: /**
1301:  * InterceptorManager
1302:  *
1303:  * 负责：
1304:  *  1. 为每个工作区创建并管理 HttpApiInterceptor 实例
1305:  *  2. 监听 VS Code 工作区变化，动态更新拦截器
1306:  *  3. 在插件停用时统一清理所有 patch
1307:  *  4. 向外暴露简洁的 start / stop / restart API
1308:  */
1309: export class InterceptorManager implements vscode.Disposable {
1310:   /** workspacePath → 拦截器实例 */
1311:   private _interceptors = new Map<string, HttpApiInterceptor>();
1312:   private _outputChannel: vscode.OutputChannel;
1313:   private _disposables: vscode.Disposable[] = [];
1314:   private _debug: boolean;
1315: 
1316:   /** 全局单例的 HTTP 拦截器（所有工作区复用） */
1317:   private _globalInterceptor: HttpApiInterceptor | null = null;
1318: 
1319:   /** 文件变更追踪器 */
1320:   private _fileChangeTracker: FileChangeTracker | null = null;
1321: 
1322:   constructor(outputChannel: vscode.OutputChannel, debug = false) {
1323:     this._outputChannel = outputChannel;
1324:     this._debug = debug;
1325:   }
1326: 
1327:   /**
1328:    * 启动拦截。
1329:    *
1330:    * 优先使用"全局单拦截器"模式：
1331:    * 一个进程内只 patch 一次，所有工作区共享。
1332:    * 工作区路径在上报时动态取当前活动工作区。
1333:    */
1334:   start(): void {
1335:     if (this._globalInterceptor?.isActive) return;
1336: 
1337:     const workspacePath = this._resolveActiveWorkspace();
1338: 
1339:     // 启动文件变更追踪器
1340:     this._fileChangeTracker = new FileChangeTracker();
1341:     this._fileChangeTracker.start(workspacePath);
1342: 
1343:     this._globalInterceptor = new HttpApiInterceptor({
1344:       workspacePath,
1345:       outputChannel: this._outputChannel,
1346:       debug: this._debug,
1347:       fileChangeTracker: this._fileChangeTracker,
1348:     });
1349: 
1350:     // 监听上报成功事件，更新状态栏徽章等
1351:     this._globalInterceptor.on("reported", () => {
1352:       // 外部（extension.ts）通过 onSessionReported 回调消费
1353:       this._onSessionReported?.();
1354:     });
1355: 
1356:     this._globalInterceptor.activate();
1357: 
1358:     // 监听工作区切换，动态更新拦截器的 workspacePath
1359:     const wsWatcher = vscode.window.onDidChangeActiveTextEditor(() => {
1360:       const newPath = this._resolveActiveWorkspace();
1361:       this._globalInterceptor?.setWorkspacePath(newPath);
1362:       this._fileChangeTracker?.setWorkspacePath(newPath);
1363:     });
1364:     this._disposables.push(wsWatcher);
1365: 
1366:     this._outputChannel.appendLine("[AgentLog] InterceptorManager 已启动");
1367:   }
1368: 
1369:   /**
1370:    * 停止所有拦截。
1371:    */
1372:   stop(): void {
1373:     this._globalInterceptor?.deactivate();
1374:     this._globalInterceptor = null;
1375:     this._fileChangeTracker?.stop();
1376:     this._fileChangeTracker = null;
1377:     this._outputChannel.appendLine("[AgentLog] InterceptorManager 已停止");
1378:   }
1379: 
1380:   /**
1381:    * 重启拦截器（配置变更后调用）。
1382:    */
1383:   restart(debug?: boolean): void {
1384:     if (debug !== undefined) this._debug = debug;
1385:     this.stop();
1386:     this.start();
1387:   }
1388: 
1389:   get isActive(): boolean {
1390:     return this._globalInterceptor?.isActive ?? false;
1391:   }
1392: 
1393:   /** 外部注册的"会话上报成功"回调（由 extension.ts 注入） */
1394:   private _onSessionReported?: () => void;
1395: 
1396:   onSessionReported(cb: () => void): void {
1397:     this._onSessionReported = cb;
1398:   }
1399: 
1400:   // ─── vscode.Disposable ──────────────────────
1401: 
1402:   dispose(): void {
1403:     this.stop();
1404:     this._fileChangeTracker?.dispose();
1405:     this._fileChangeTracker = null;
1406:     for (const d of this._disposables) d.dispose();
1407:     this._disposables = [];
1408:     this._interceptors.clear();
1409:   }
1410: 
1411:   // ─── 工具方法 ───────────────────────────────
1412: 
1413:   /**
1414:    * 获取当前活动编辑器所属工作区的路径。
1415:    * 若无活动编辑器，取第一个工作区文件夹。
1416:    */
1417:   private _resolveActiveWorkspace(): string {
1418:     const editor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
1419:     if (editor) {
1420:       const wsFolder = vscode.workspace.getWorkspaceFolder(editor.document.uri);
1421:       if (wsFolder) return wsFolder.uri.fsPath;
1422:     }
1423: 
1424:     const folders = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders;
1425:     if (folders && folders.length > 0) {
1426:       return folders[0].uri.fsPath;
1427:     }
1428:     return "";
1429:   }
1430: }

/**
 * @agentlog/vscode-extension — API 拦截器
 *
 * 职责：在开发者使用 Cline、Cursor 等 AI 工具时，
 * 拦截对国内大模型（DeepSeek、Qwen、Kimi 等）的 HTTP/HTTPS 请求，
 * 提取 Prompt、Reasoning（推理过程）和 Response，
 * 并通过 BackendClient 上报到本地后台存储。
 *
 * 实现策略：
 *  - 通过 Monkey-patch Node.js 内置的 http.request / https.request，
 *    在 VS Code 扩展进程层面全局拦截所有出站 HTTP(S) 请求。
 *  - 对匹配到的 AI API 端点，拦截请求体与响应体（含 SSE 流式响应）。
 *  - 支持 OpenAI-Compatible 接口规范（DeepSeek / Qwen / Kimi / Doubao 均兼容）。
 *
 * ⚠️  注意事项：
 *  - Monkey-patch 会影响整个扩展进程，使用时务必保证幂等性（不重复 patch）。
 *  - 仅拦截匹配 AI_HOST_PATTERNS 的域名，不拦截无关请求。
 *  - 拦截器采集数据后异步上报，不阻塞原始请求链路。
 */

parts.text:
让我理解这个代码的问题。用户提到两个问题：

1. VSCode Cline插件无法通过 apiInterceptor.ts 获取 deepseek-resoner 模型修改了哪些文件
2. 上报后端的推理过程记录和AI回复记录是重复的

让我先看看文件变更追踪的逻辑。当前的 FileChangeTracker 是通过监听 VS Code 的文件保存、创建、删除事件来追踪文件变更的。

问题1：对于 Cline（使用 deepseek-reasoner），当前的实现可能无法正确获取修改的文件。Cline 可能在 AI 响应后才写入文件，所以默认有 5 秒的缓冲时间（bufferMs = 5000）。

但是问题可能在于：Cline 可能不是通过 VS Code 的文件事件来写入文件的，而是直接通过其他方式（比如 MCP 服务器）。我需要看看 Cline 是如何工作的。

问题2：关于推理过程和 AI 回复记录重复的问题。从代码来看：

```typescript
const reasoning = extractReasoning(responseContent, reasoningContent || undefined);
// 若 reasoning 已内嵌在 content 中，从 content 中去除 <think> 块
let cleanedResponse = responseContent
  .replace(/<think>[\s\S]*?<\/think>/gi, "")
  .trim();

// deepseek-reasoner 等推理模型可能 content 为空，所有输出都在 reasoning_content 中。

当 reasoning 字段有内容但 content 为空时，代码会用 reasoning 的前 500 字符作为 response 摘要。不过这样做的结果是 reasoning 字段保存了完整的推理过程，而 cleanedResponse 也包含了这些内容（通过 reasoning 截取的），两者就产生了重复。

DeepSeek-R1 这类模型的响应中，推理内容可能同时存在于 reasoning_content 字段和 content 字段（以 <think>... 形式），所以需要在两个地方都进行去重。我应该检查其他相关代码，看是否存在类似的问题。
让我查看更多相关代码来理解这两个问题。

parts.text:
现在我理解了问题的全貌：

1. **问题1：无法获取 deepseek-reasoner 模型修改的文件**
   - 当前 FileChangeTracker 只监听 VS Code 的 `onDidSaveTextDocument`、`onDidCreateFiles`、`onDidDeleteFiles`、`onDidRenameFiles` 事件
   - 但是 Cline 可能不通过 VS Code 的文件事件来写入文件，它可能直接通过文件系统写入（或者通过其他扩展/MCP）
   - 需要看看 Cline 是如何写入文件的，或者扩展 FileChangeTracker 来更好地追踪文件变更

2. **问题2：推理过程和 AI 回复记录重复**
   - 从 apiInterceptor.ts 代码来看：
     ```typescript
     const reasoning = extractReasoning(responseContent, reasoningContent || undefined);
     let cleanedResponse = responseContent
       .replace(/<think>[\s\S]*?<\/think>/gi, "")
       .trim();
     
     if (!cleanedResponse && reasoning) {
       cleanedResponse = reasoning.length > 500 ? ... : reasoning;
     }
     ```
   - 当 deepseek-reasoner 模型只有 reasoning_content（content 为空）时，会用 reasoning 填充 cleanedResponse
   - 这导致 reasoning 和 response 字段都包含了推理内容，产生重复

212:     total,
213:     page,
214:     pageSize,
215:   };
216: }
217: 
218: /**
219:  * 按 Commit Hash 查询关联的会话列表。
220:  */
221: export function getSessionsByCommitHash(
222:   commitHash: string,
223: ): AgentSession[] {
224:   const db = getDatabase();
225:   const rows = db
226:     .prepare(
227:       'SELECT * FROM agent_sessions WHERE commit_hash = ? ORDER BY created_at ASC',
228:     )
229:     .all(commitHash) as SessionRow[];
230:   return rows.map(rowToSession);
231: }
232: 
233: /**
234:  * 查询指定工作区内尚未绑定任何 Commit 的会话（按时间倒序）。
235:  * 在"自动绑定最近会话"场景中使用。
236:  */
237: export function getUnboundSessions(
238:   workspacePath: string,
239:   limit = 50,
240: ): AgentSession[] {
241:   const db = getDatabase();
242:   const rows = db
243:     .prepare(`
244:       SELECT * FROM agent_sessions
245:       WHERE workspace_path = ? AND commit_hash IS NULL
246:       ORDER BY created_at DESC
247:       LIMIT ?
248:     `)
249:     .all(workspacePath, limit) as SessionRow[];
250:   return rows.map(rowToSession);
251: }
252: 
253: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
254: // 更新
255: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
256: 
257: /** 将一批会话绑定到同一个 Commit Hash */
258: export function bindSessionsToCommit(
259:   sessionIds: string[],
260:   commitHash: string,
261: ): number {
262:   if (sessionIds.length === 0) return 0;
263: 
264:   const db = getDatabase();
265: 
266:   const bindAll = db.transaction(() => {
267:     const stmt = db.prepare(
268:       'UPDATE agent_sessions SET commit_hash = ? WHERE id = ?',
269:     );
270:     let affected = 0;
271:     for (const id of sessionIds) {
272:       const result = stmt.run(commitHash, id);
273:       affected += result.changes;
274:     }
275:     return affected;
276:   });
277: 
278:   return bindAll() as number;
279: }
280: 
281: /** 解绑会话与 Commit 的关联（将 commit_hash 置为 NULL） */
282: export function unbindSessionFromCommit(sessionId: string): boolean {
283:   const db = getDatabase();
284:   const result = db
285:     .prepare('UPDATE agent_sessions SET commit_hash = NULL WHERE id = ?')
286:     .run(sessionId);
287:   return result.changes > 0;
288: }
289: 
290: /** 更新会话的标签 */
291: export function updateSessionTags(
292:   sessionId: string,
293:   tags: string[],
294: ): AgentSession | null {
295:   const db = getDatabase();
296:   const result = db
297:     .prepare('UPDATE agent_sessions SET tags = ? WHERE id = ?')
298:     .run(toJson(tags), sessionId);
299: 
300:   if (result.changes === 0) return null;
301:   return getSessionById(sessionId);
302: }
303: 
304: /** 更新会话的备注 */
305: export function updateSessionNote(
306:   sessionId: string,
307:   note: string,
308: ): AgentSession | null {
309:   const db = getDatabase();
310:   const result = db
311:     .prepare('UPDATE agent_sessions SET note = ? WHERE id = ?')
312:     .run(note || null, sessionId);
313: 
314:   if (result.changes === 0) return null;
315:   return getSessionById(sessionId);
316: }
317: 
318: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
319: // 删除
320: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
321: 
322: /** 按 ID 删除单条会话，返回是否成功删除 */
323: export function deleteSession(sessionId: string): boolean {
324:   const db = getDatabase();
325:   const result = db
326:     .prepare('DELETE FROM agent_sessions WHERE id = ?')
327:     .run(sessionId);
328:   return result.changes > 0;
329: }
330: 
331: /**
332:  * 删除超过保留期限的会话（数据清理用）。
333:  *
334:  * @param retentionDays 保留天数，0 表示永久保留
335:  * @returns 删除的记录数
336:  */
337: export function pruneOldSessions(retentionDays: number): number {
338:   if (retentionDays <= 0) return 0;
339: 
340:   const db = getDatabase();
341:   const cutoff = new Date(
342:     Date.now() - retentionDays * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000,
343:   ).toISOString();
344: 
345:   const result = db
346:     .prepare("DELETE FROM agent_sessions WHERE created_at < ?")
347:     .run(cutoff);
348: 
349:   return result.changes;
350: }
351: 
352: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
353: // 统计
354: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
355: 
356: export interface SessionStats {
357:   total: number;
358:   boundToCommit: number;
359:   unbound: number;
360:   byProvider: Record<string, number>;
361:   bySource: Record<string, number>;
362:   avgDurationMs: number;
363: }
364: 
365: /**
366:  * 返回指定工作区（或全局）的会话统计数据。
367:  */
368: export function getSessionStats(workspacePath?: string): SessionStats {
369:   const db = getDatabase();
370: 
371:   const where = workspacePath ? 'WHERE workspace_path = ?' : '';
372:   const args = workspacePath ? [workspacePath] : [];
373: 
374:   const { total } = db
375:     .prepare(`SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM agent_sessions ${where}`)
376:     .get(...args) as { total: number };
377: 
378:   const { bound } = db
379:     .prepare(
380:       `SELECT COUNT(*) as bound FROM agent_sessions ${where ? where + ' AND' : 'WHERE'} commit_hash IS NOT NULL`,
381:     )
382:     .get(...args) as { bound: number };
383: 
384:   const { avg_ms } = db
385:     .prepare(`SELECT AVG(duration_ms) as avg_ms FROM agent_sessions ${where}`)
386:     .get(...args) as { avg_ms: number | null };
387: 
388:   // 按 provider 分组
389:   const providerRows = db
390:     .prepare(
391:       `SELECT provider, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM agent_sessions ${where} GROUP BY provider`,
392:     )
393:     .all(...args) as Array<{ provider: string; cnt: number }>;
394: 
395:   // 按 source 分组
396:   const sourceRows = db
397:     .prepare(
398:       `SELECT source, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM agent_sessions ${where} GROUP BY source`,
399:     )
400:     .all(...args) as Array<{ source: string; cnt: number }>;
401: 
402:   return {
403:     total,
404:     boundToCommit: bound,
405:     unbound: total - bound,
406:     byProvider: Object.fromEntries(providerRows.map((r) => [r.provider, r.cnt])),
407:     bySource: Object.fromEntries(sourceRows.map((r) => [r.source, r.cnt])),
408:     avgDurationMs: Math.round(avg_ms ?? 0),
409:   };
410: }
411: 
412: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
413: // JSONL 导出（原始数据备份）
414: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────

417:  * 将符合 filter 条件的会话序列化为 JSONL 格式字符串。
418:  * 每行一个 JSON 对象，方便流式处理和 grep 检索。
419:  */
420: export function exportSessionsAsJsonl(
421:   filter: SessionQueryFilter = {},
422: ): string {
423:   // 移除分页限制，全量导出
424:   const allFilter: SessionQueryFilter = { ...filter, page: 1, pageSize: 99999 };
425:   const { data } = querySessions(allFilter);
426:   return data.map((s) => JSON.stringify(s)).join('\n');
427: }

parts.text:
现在让我修复问题2。根据代码逻辑：

```typescript
const reasoning = extractReasoning(responseContent, reasoningContent || undefined);
let cleanedResponse = responseContent
  .replace(/<think>[\s\S]*?<\/think>/gi, "")
  .trim();

if (!cleanedResponse && reasoning) {
  cleanedResponse =
    reasoning.length > 500
      ? reasoning.substring(0, 500) +
        "…（推理过程，完整内容见 reasoning 字段）"
      : reasoning;
}
```

问题是当 reasoning 存在时，会把 reasoning 的内容也放到 response 中。正确的逻辑应该是：
- reasoning 字段保存完整的推理内容
- response 字段只保存真正的 AI 回复（去除 <think> 后的内容）
- 如果 content 为空，才把 reasoning 作为 response 的 fallback（但不应该重复）

修复方案：
1. 当 cleanedResponse 为空且有 reasoning 时，reasoning 本身就是 response 的内容，不需要再重复
2. 关键是：当 content 为空用 reasoning 作为 response 时，不应该在 reasoning 字段再保存一次

让我重新考虑：实际上问题在于，当 deepseek-reasoner 返回时：
- `responseContent` 可能是空的或者只包含 <think> 块
- `reasoningContent` 包含完整的推理过程

代码执行流程：
1. `extractReasoning` 从 `reasoningContent` 提取推理内容到 `reasoning`


2. `cleanedResponse` 去除 <think> 块后，如果为空且存在 reasoning，就将 reasoning 赋给 cleanedResponse

这导致 reasoning 和 cleanedResponse 指向同一份内容，造成重复。解决方案是在这种特殊情况下避免重复赋值，因为 reasoning 已经保存了完整的推理过程。
现在修复问题1，增加文件变更检测的缓冲时间。Cline 在收到 AI 响应后才写入文件，可能需要更长的缓冲时间。当前默认是 5 秒，让我增加到更合理的时间，比如 30 秒。
